reviews.title: Good find!
reviews.text: I got this to keep in my work bag as a backup/when I work from home. I will say the first impression wasn't stellar. The top plastic has a cheap look/feel to it. But it also makes up in some nice touches. For example, the USB fob. I was apprehensive about the keep slot for it because there wasn't something that made it feel or look actually secured. But turns out, there's magnetic component so it gets sucked in rather than loosely placed. Battery power seems as advertised. I haven't charged mine in about a month and it's still going. Ergonomics is about what you'd expect based on the photos.

reviews.title: No more Batteries
reviews.text: Love my new mouse! Old one I would turn off and on all the time to save battery. This one I keep wanting to then remember it goes to sleep and no more batteries. First charge went fast, haven't had to charge it since. Love the self storing dongle. Should have purchased this long time ago.

reviews.title: Very cute.

Really love this mouse. It is very cute, lightweight, easy to use and comfortable in your hands. Very easy to set up. Only issue was the back covering is a bit loose. Think it is a factory fault or something. It isn't falling off so far though, thankfully. That's is why it lost a star.

Overall I was very pleased with the product. Really looovvvve how cute it looks.

title: VELOCIFIRE V9 RGB Gaming Mouse, 9800 Optical Sensor 4 Adjustable DPI with 16.8 Million Color Backlit 8 Programmable Buttons Tunable Weights - Black
features: MUST HAVE - With advanced ergonomics that comfortably support your entire hand. The 8 programmable buttons can be customized with ease to fine tune your play.

ACCURATE RESPONSIVE - Control like you are in the game. Get maximum tracking accuracy from our most responsive optical sensor, minimizes mouse acceleration and increases reliable targeting. Switch DPI modes on the fly - choose from four settings from 100 to 8200 DPI.

BALANCE AND WEIGHT AT YOUR CONTROL - It’s your mouse the way you like it. Customize to your advantage. Three 4.3g weights come with your V9 Mice. Use some or all of them in the positions where you like more weight, or less. This mouse can be tailored to your preferences.
Programmable RGB Lighting - Adjustable RGB lighting lets you select from approximately 16.8 million colors. Use Velocifire Gaming Software to choose lighting color and brightness to match your style.

DPI SHIFT IN-GAME - Be ready in an instant. Be an unstoppable force with V9 Mice in either low or high DPI. Shift from headshot-precise 100 DPI targeting to lightning-fast 8200 DPI maneuvers by shifting through up to four DPI settings per profile.

reviews.title: faulty unit
reviews.text: The right click does not work, it seems to be a design flaw or its just so cheap.

reviews.title: I found the buttons too easy to click
reviews.text: Meh...I found the buttons too easy to click, sometimes just the weight of my hand would make the mouse click. Also, the mouse cursor would wander when the mouse itself wasn't moving. It has some features that surprised me like being able to take weights in and out of the mouse for customized weight, but the easy clicks and the wandering cursor were deal breakers. Overall it feels a bit cheap. I got a logitech 510 instead and really like that mouse. Just a casual gamer here, wasn't looking for anything fancy.

reviews.title: Great Mouse!
reviews.text:
I really like this mouse and for the money, it is by far the best value in a gaming mouse I have purchased to date. I have spent over $100 for other gaming mice just to have them wear out after a year of use. I paid about $20 for this mouse and I am not disappointed in the quality at all. It uses the same switches as more expensive mice, feels great in my hand and is just as responsive as those more expensive models I purchased in the past. You may not get all the RGB lighting effects or programming features, but for the cost it cannot be beat.

The only thing that is a slight disappointment is the scroll wheel. One click is too strong and there are no settings in the software to adjust it. For the price I paid, it is something I can easily overlook and still give this mouse a 5 star review.

reviews.title: Defective Mouse
reviews.text:
This mouse would rate five stars if it didn't go bad after the return date.

It feels nice in the hand, it does all the mouse things it is supposed to, and it slides around smoothly. That is, when it decides to connect to my computer. I have a macbook pro with a bootcamp partition and primarily plug in through a USB hub. At first, I thought the hub had issues, but my keyboard is also connected to the hub and it has zero problems connecting with either OS. The mouse, on the other hand, likes to go on strike, even when plugged directly into the laptop's USB port. I have yet to determine the conditions cause the mouse to stop working, but I have yet to find a pattern. The mouse is just as likely to stop working on El Capitan as it is on Windows 10.

I tried to contact Velocifire since my mouse started being lazy after the return window, but I never heard back. I will not be buying from this company again.

title: COCNI Slim Silent Wireless Mouse, Portable 2.4GHz Wireless Computer Mouse with 3 Adjustable DPI and USB Receiver, Optical Office Wireless Mouse for Laptop, Desktop, MacBook, Chromebook, PC

Even without a mouse pad, this wireless mouse will not affect daily use. It allows you to use your laptop to work easily in an emergency or when you have not prepared the mouse pad in advance.

It will automatically enter the sleep mode after 6 minutes, without any operation, just click any button to activate the wireless mouse.

【Silent Click, Comfortable Feel】The design of the mute button can reduce the noise by 90%, which makes it an ideal wireless mouse for offices, conference rooms, cafes, libraries and bedrooms, helping you concentrate on your work and study without disturbing others except you. The slim shape, anti sweat, anti fingerprint and skin friendly surface of the wireless mouse provide maximum comfort and support. Robust rollers ensure that your hands do not slip when rolling. This wireless mouse has been designed by thousands of people. It is ergonomic and allows you to use the mouse at a high frequency without causing your fingers to feel sore.

【Strong Compatibility, Slim Portable Size】This COCNI wireless mouse is used in various computer devices (Macbook, Laptop, Desktop etc.) and various computer operating systems (MacOS, Win xp/7/8/10, Linux etc.). The ultra-thin design allows the cordless mouse to be carried anywhere at any time, because it can be easily placed in a laptop box or bag. Light and compact, it is very suitable for business trip or travel.

【High Quality Customer Service】We provide 24-hour customer service. For any questions about this wireless mouse, please feel free to contact us through your order page. If you are not satisfied with our wireless mouse, we will give you a full refund.Our service tenet is to "let customers buy at ease, use at ease, and have no worries after sales." reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text:
The factory feet on my mouse were leaving dark spots on my light colored desk at work.
These fit great and have noticeably lower friction than the worn factory pads. The adhesive is strong but repositionable if you don't get it right first time.
When the old pads are removed, they can split into separate layers, but you should be able to get down to the bare plastic if you take care to grab the lowest layer of clear adhesive.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

title: Logitech M585 Multi-Device Wireless Mouse – Control and Move Text/Images/Files Between 2 Windows and Apple Mac Computers and Laptops with Bluetooth or USB, 2 Year Battery Life, Graphite
description: Talk about a game changer! With Logitech FLOW, M585 Multi-Device has the almost magical capacity to navigate seamlessly on two computers and copy-paste from one to the other – even if you're using a PC and a Mac. It certainly beats sending yourself emails. M585 also comes with a host of other features to improve your productivity, your way: fast and easy scrolling through long web pages; five programmable buttons, including two handy thumb buttons; a 2-year battery life** and a curved, domed shape that supports your palm comfortably during long hours of work or play. Dual connectivity (Bluetooth or 2.4 GHz Logitech Unifying). System Requirements: Required: Bluetooth low energy technologyWindows 10 or later Windows 8Mac OS X 10.10 or lateChrome OSAndroid 5.0 or later|Required: Available USB portWindows 10 or later Windows 8 Windows 7Mac OS X 10.05 or laterChrome OS|Internet connection for software download USB port.
features: CROSS-COMPUTER CONTROL - Game-changing capacity to navigate seamlessly on two computers, and copy-paste text, images, and files from one to the other using Logitech FLOW
DUAL CONNECTIVITY - Use with up to three Windows or Mac computers and laptops via included Unifying receiver or Bluetooth Smart wireless technology
LONG BATTERY LIFE- The Logitech M585 just keeps going, with 2 years of power on a single AA battery
ULTRA-PRECISE SCROLLING- Micro-precision wheel packs more grooves per millimeter to make scrolling through long webpages faster and easier
CURVED DESIGN - Domed shape provides right hand support for your palm comfortably during long hours of work or play
Note : In case of Wireless mouse, the USB receiver will be provided inside or along with the mouse

reviews.title: Excellent travel size and 6 month long battery life!
reviews.text:
Updated 1 year later(May 3, 2020)

Down grading from 5 stars to 3 stars because it turns out there might be a bug in the mouse that once you pair it with 2 different computers over bluetooth, you cannot reset the mouse to use the wireless dongle. There is also no support on the Logitech website - try searching their website for the manual for this mouse, it's absolutely missing. You'll see an FAQ section and some various sections on tech spec, but no setup guide or manual!

*********

If you're tried of replacing batteries, this mouse is for you! I'm impressed by how long a single AA battery lasts in this mouse. I haven't had to replace the battery since getting it 6 months ago even with daily use. The two modes is nice since it lets me connect this mouse to two computers! The bluetooth is strong and connects well to my MacBook Pro, while the included radio frequency receiver is plugged into a iMac and I can switch between computers with a. simple button click.

reviews.title: Great travel mouse!
reviews.text: Love the feel of it. Easy to connect. Small enough to use for travel yet big enough to where it doesn’t hurt to use ergonomically.

reviews.title: WOW! Seamless movement from one computer to the other!
reviews.text:
This device synched to both computers quickly. Download the 'Logi Options' software on both, then enable 'Flow'
Move the mouse off the bottom of one screen & it appears at the top of the other laptop.
Copy a file on computer one, switch to the computer two, right-click->paste. You have copied the file took computer one to computer two.
The mouse itself is legit comfortable, precise asks smooth.
Add 'Flow' and it is also revolutionary.
Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Nice mouse for Mac Pro using Big Sur OS
reviews.text: I was looking for a mouse for my MacPro computer.  It's got 2 buttons on the mouse that I wanted to setup as volume up, and volume down.  But there is no instructions on how to do this, and I can't find any.  I'm using the mouse as a standard mouse with scroll for web pages.  Works perfect for that.

reviews.title: Nice and quiet
reviews.text:
Nice, quiet mouse at a great price. It's on the smaller size, just what I needed for carrying in the computer bag. I have long fingers, but not necessarily large hands, and this fits perfectly for me. The scroll wheel is nice and smooth (and also quiet). You can feel some tactile "knurling" when you scroll, so it's not baby's-butt-smooth, but it's not like scrolling over a circular-saw blade either.

Using the USB dongle, the mouse is very responsive. The Bluetooth connection seemed a little laggy to me. No stars off unless it does the same when I test it on another PC.

I do not intend to install the Logitech Options software so I cannot speak to the usefulness of Flow or reassigning buttons.

Pros
- USB and Bluetooth connectivity
- Can use with up to two devices.
- 7 buttons: L, R, Center, Center-Left, Center-Right, Back, Forward. Eight if you include the PC selector button.
- Very quiet left/right click buttons
- Nearly quiet center click and back/forward buttons
- Uses one AA battery (preferred over non-replaceable battery)
- Battery life advertised at 2 years.
- Has an on/off switch on the bottom

Cons
- Possible laggy response using Bluetooth. I need to test on another PC to be sure.

Other consideration:
- The USB dongle storage is behind the battery door. If you frequently remove the dongle from the PC, this might be a concern for you (it's not a problem for me).

title: BreSii Wireless Mouse, Wireless Mouse for Laptop with Mouse Pad, Type-C & USB 2 in 1 Receiver Cordless Computer Mice Slim Silent Mouse for Tablet,PC,Laptop,MacBook,Notebook,Phone(Grey)
features: 【Wireless Mouse for Laptop with Mouse Pad】wireless mouse with 2 in 1 2.4G USB and Type-C receivers, specially slim and grey color designed mouse for MAC book, imac, and all devices with Type-C or USB port, works for MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, iMac, Mac mini. The mouse pad is made of non-toxic, safe and soft breathable materials. The surface adopts premium-textured and smooth cloth to let your mouse glides over smoothly and the non-slip rubber base provides stable operation for the mouse.

【Wireless Mouse Fast Operation 2.4G Wireless Plug and Play】Mouse USB/USB C receiver is in the battery compartment of the mouse. Take it out and plug it into the type-C/USB port of the device. No additional drivers or software needed. Then enjoy 2.4G wireless stable connection and a longer working distance of up to 33-65ft.

【Silent Mouse Quiet Click & Ultra-Slim】For Mac mouse Special soundless Mouse buttons help you build a quiet atmosphere without disturbing others. Ultra-Slim mouse size makes it easy to put into your laptop bag, suitable for home, office, school and café etc. The scroll wheel is wrapped with anti-skid silica gel to reduce the pressure of your fingers. It is an ideal choice to help your kids work well on their E-Learning on laptops.

【Type c Mouse Strong Energy Saving】Automatically power saving and sleep mode make the battery life longer, it will into power saving mode after 5 seconds and sleep mode after 15 minutes, it just click any button to wake up when use. There is also on/off switch to help conserve battery use. Don't need to replace the battery for months. (Battery is not included)

【Wide Compatibility High Accuracy】High Speed DPI up to 1600, tracks well and no delays. Compatible with system: ●Windows XP/ 7 /8 /10 ●Mac OS ●Mac IOS ● Android etc. Compatible with devices: PC, Computer, Laptop, MacBook, Notebook, Chrome book, Phone and Tablet etc. (As long as your device has a Type-c or ordinary USB port.)

title: 2Sets Hyperslides Rounded Curved Edges Mouse Feet, Skates, Pads for Logitech G903 Lightspeed, G903 Hero Gaming Mouse Feet Replacement (0.8mm, Smooth Glide, Pure White PTFE) Pro Performance Upgrade
features: ✔️ [High Quality] Replacement mouse feet that increases your control and accuracy by providing the smoothest and most consistent slide
✔️ [Buttery Smooth] Having a smoother slide helps reduce grip tension which improves accuracy and decreases wrist strain for longer and more enjoyable gaming or work sessions
✔️ [Exclusionary Tech] Our exclusive technology produces rounded edges for a scratch-free slide right out of the package; no break-in period required
✔️ [Meticulous Design] Specially calibrated 0.80 mm thickness: Provides the ideal feet height that eliminates "bottom-scraping" & provides longer life-span
✔️ [Longevity] We include 2 sets made of 100% virgin grade PTFE material for the lowest friction and eco-friendly, 3M no-residue adhesive

reviews.title: Really improve the feel
reviews.text:
Before this I have never really considered changing the mouse feet. The only reason I purchased these was because I need to remove the old ones to solder in a new switch.

With the new micro switches installed. https://amzn.to/3ElgafC ( incase you are curious which ones) and the new feet this made a whole new mouse.

The feet arrived perfect no bends or wrinkles. Super easy to install. Just make sure you clean the area really good with some alcohol.

They glide so much better than stock feet. The feel is simply amazing. Now whenever I purchase a new mouse I will be upgrading the feet. If you are on the fence about it I would say go for it.

For durability I have had these on for over a month and they have no signs of wear. They still perform excellent.

Thank you for taking the time to read this and I hope that it was helpful in your purchase decision

reviews.title: ASMR fantastic!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5a9baeffb5013de01b566ac34f1da8a5]] Love the way this keyboard sounds as I type.  I also like that the round keys allow a little more room in between keys and that I don’t make as many errors while typing.  The color is great and the design is think and sleek.

reviews.title: my favorite keyboard
reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M525 - Red/Black
description:
Product Description
With micro-precise scrolling, ultra-smooth cursor control and super-long-and-reliable battery power, the compact Logitech Wireless Mouse M525 screams control-and personal style in your choice of sweet color combinations. System Requirements: Windows XP Windows Vista Windows 7 Windows 8 Windows 10|Mac OS X 10.5 or later|Linux kernel 2.6+|USB port|Internet access.
From the Manufacturer
Features
Compare
Which Logitech Wireless Mouse is right for you?
Create The Combo That Works For You
Logitech has a range of products that you can connect via a single, tiny Unifying receiver you leave plugged in to your notebook. Mix. Match. Unify. Now you can create your perfect laptop workstation, wherever you work.
features: Micro-precision scroll wheel: Faster, easier web navigation plus advanced optical sensor for smooth tracking on more surfaces, USB receiver is stored inside the mouse where the batteries are located
Extended battery life: Go for up to three years without a battery change (Battery life may vary based on user and computing conditions)
Compact comfort in cool colors: Ergonomic shape, soft rubber grips and great style that's easy to take anywhere
Multi-device wireless receiver: Tiny Unifying receiver connects up to six Unifying-compatible devices
For Windows and Mac computers: Works with Windows XP, Vista, 7 and Mac OS X 10.5 or later
Receiver Dimensions (HxWxD): 0.57in (14.4mm) x 0.74in (18.7mm) x 0.24in (6.1mm); Receiver Weight: 0.06oz (1.8g)

reviews.title: Perfect Replacement For M505
reviews.text: My M505 finally quit working dependably for me after nearly 3 years of dedicated service. I loved the design and how I never had to change the batteries, not even once in those 3 years. So I sought out another one only to find they are no longer made. But I did discover this M525 and after a little research I purchased. I am extremely happy with this newer version of my older mouse. It is nearly identical to my M505, so close in fact that I have yet to notice any major differences except for the color. I recommend this M525 to anyone who likes the freedom of a wireless mouse and doesn't want to bother with changing batteries!

features: ✔ Rechargable Wireless Mouse: Built-in high quality rechargeble 700mAh battery, can last up to 500hours use after a single full charged. The laptop wireless mouse will enter into sleep mode automatically after 3 minutes of inactivity to save power, and it will be activated again by gently moved

✔ 2.4GHz Wireless Data Transfer: 2.4G Wireless technology support stable connection and precise track with working distance of up to 10 meters. Play and Plug. 3 DPI switches (1000, 1200, 1600) change the speed of the mouse freely

✔ Silent and Durable Clicking: Mute design with advanced sensor provides noiseless clicks, perfect for public place like libraries, home, offices and any other occasions where you do not want to disturb others.(Please note: only the left and right main keys support silent click.)

reviews.title: No instructions on box but, easy
reviews.text: Perfect and does the job. I had to google the instructions. But it’s super easy set up. The little usb part that needs to plug into your laptop to talk to the mouse, is plugged into the under side of the mouse, simply pull out and stick into the laptop, switch the button on the mouse (on bottom) to on, and as long as charged up, it’s ready to go. Battery life is banging. I’d recommend. It’s light and not super quality,but it’s doing the job and it’s light and comfy. Recommend.

reviews.title: Impressed!
reviews.text: This was everything I was looking for in a mouse; matte finish, silent clicks, mouse speed options, and easy connectivity! I like a flatter mouse as I find them easier to use for gaming or anything that needs a lot of movement, and the noiseless clicks make it that much easier to stay up for late-night sessions without annoying any roommates/others trying to sleep. Super easy set-up, my laptop recognized the mouse and connected to it as soon as I inserted the USB. All in all, very happy with this mouse!

30 days money-back and 12-months guaranty,
when you are not satisfied with our product or you have any question, please contact us to get a after-sale service, we will give you a satisfied response within 12 hours.
How to use：
It came with a USB cord that you use to connect it to a laptop or charger box for charging,  Then popped the USB connector into a USB port, pay attention the receiver contact with USB interface whether are in good condition, then wait for 5 seconds around to normal work
How long one need to charge the unit:
Its standard charge takes 4 hours, the longest charge time is less than or equal to 8 hours.The average charge every three days

It stays charged for a long time and is virtually silent.  Power Saving:It goes to sleep if not used for few minutes saving the charge! This mouse connects easily, no battery is needed it’s rechargable.

1.Definitely recommend having a moues pad with this mouse 2.The mouse charges with a unique usb cable, so be sure not to lose it! 3.It’s rechargable,no battery is needed. It goes to sleep if not used for few minutes saving the charge!
